sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the current state and try clicking blue block 4 to shift the lower section right
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current state:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    if n['color'] in ['c', 'N', 'W', 'b']:
        print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)} cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Try clicking blue block 4 multiple times to shift the lower section right
print("\nTrying blue block 4 (shift lower section right):")
for i in range(8):
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 1}])
    
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    # Track charcoal and light green positions
    charcoal_pos = None
    green_positions = []
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 16:
            b = n['boundary']
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            charcoal_pos = (min(cols), max(cols))
        if n['color'] == 'N':
            b = n['boundary']
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            green_positions.append((min(cols), max(cols)))
    
    print(f"  After click {i+1}: charcoal={charcoal_pos}, greens={green_positions}")
    print(f"    Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
    if last_action_result.get('level_completed', False):
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
